use_cases: Displaying real-time notification updates in a notification center
Live activity feeds for dashboards showing system events
Auto-scrolling notification streams that users can pause on hover
Activity monitoring for dev-tools like Sentry, Linear, and Slack integrations
Real-time payment and transaction alerts for fintech applications
ai_summary: A live notification feed component featuring auto-scrolling updates that cycle every 1.6 seconds with hover-to-pause functionality. Displays timestamped feed items like payments, issues, and alerts with smooth motion animations. Supports dark mode and includes default examples from common integrations like Stripe, Linear, Slack, and Sentry for immediate demonstration.
